decisions.summary: Accept bounded scope follow-up for related-file blast radius
decisions.reason: Scope boundary is one CLI/API contract: pr prepare bounded LLM projections. Related-file blast radius is constrained to projection shaping, CLI option routing/help, focused tests, and story/spec/architecture docs. Graph/code-topology blast-radius automation is useful follow-up but non-blocking for this coherent PR because reviewer ownership is single-surface and the changed files are explicitly listed in the story/spec docs.

decisions.summary: No split required for single contract surface
decisions.reason: The PR changes one public developer-tool behavior: bounded LLM handoff views for pr prepare. Documentation and tests are supporting artifacts for the same surface, not independent product changes.

decisions.summary: Keep bounded artifact projection work in one PR
decisions.reason: The touched files form one reviewable CLI contract: projection shaping in src/canonical-audit.js, CLI routing/help in src/cli.js, focused regression tests, and story/spec/architecture docs. Splitting would separate contract, implementation, and verification, making the handoff behavior harder to review.
